questionText: Put these numbers in order from smallest to largest: 0.4, 3/8, 0.35, 2/5

markScheme.description: Converts fractions to decimals or common form

hints.text: Try converting all values to the same type — either all decimals or all fractions.
Convert 3/8 and 2/5 to decimals first, then compare with 0.4 and 0.35.
M1: convert fractions. A1: order from smallest — 0.35, then 0.375, then 0.4.
